  • Overview

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AbstractPlayer
    Base implementation shared by all player types.
    Card
    Immutable card from a standard poker deck.
    CardSelectionListener
    Functional interface used when the user selects a card in the hand.
    CincuentazoApplication
    JavaFX entry point for the Cincuentazo application.
    Deck
    Dynamic deck that draws from the top and receives cards at the bottom.
    EmptyDeckException
    Checked exception thrown when a draw operation cannot obtain a card.
    GameController
    JavaFX controller that binds the FXML view with the Cincuentazo model.
    GameEventAdapter
    Empty adapter for game event listeners that only need selected callbacks.
    GameEventListener
    Observer interface used by the model to notify game changes.
    GameException
    Base checked exception for recoverable game flow errors.
    GameModel
    Central model that owns all Cincuentazo rules and state transitions.
    GameStateException
    Unchecked exception used for programming errors or invalid state transitions.
    HumanPlayer
    Human controlled player.
    InvalidMoveException
    Checked exception thrown when a card cannot be played by the current rules.
    KeyboardShortcutAdapter
    Adapter for JavaFX keyboard handlers with no-op extension points.
    Launcher
    Plain Java launcher used by IDEs that do not configure the JavaFX module path automatically.
    MachinePlayer
    Automated player with a simple safe-card strategy.
    NoPlayableCardException
    Checked exception thrown when a player has no legal cards for the table sum.
    Player
    Defines common behavior for human and machine players.
    Rank
    Represents card ranks and their Cincuentazo values.
    Suit
    Represents the four suits in a standard poker deck.
